title: SSR: Sparse Scene Representation for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: A fast end-to-end driving model used here as an example paper for the Triggered-VLA paper map.

title: DriveLM: Driving with Graph Visual Question Answering
summary: A representative vision-language style autonomous driving paper for map organization and comparison.

title: AdaThinkDrive: Adaptive Thinking for Autonomous Driving
summary: A trigger-based driving paper example that is useful for building a paper relation board.

title: Impromptu-VLA: Vision-Language-Action Models for Driving
summary: A VLA-style paper example for the slow but strong reasoning branch in your collection.

title: Triggered-VLA
summary: Your own project entry. You can keep this as the center of the board and connect related work around it.
